PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MARTINEZ, GIOVANNI ERNESTO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LUONG, VAN MANH $325.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.00, PLT. ON ORIGINAL COMPLT. LUONG, VAN MANH TAKE NOTHING AS TO ORIGINAL COMPLT. EA. PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COST. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
